remarks: Welcome to Linden House located in the heart of desirable village of Glenbrook. Impeccable throughout - updated kitchen with granite counters, backsplash, stainless steel appliances and breakfast counter. Adjacent dining room with beautiful courtyard views and patio. Huge living room with courtyard views also, oversized bedroom and tastefully updated bath. crown mouldings throughout, neutral paint, refinished gleaming hardwood floors, great closet space, 2 air conditioners. Private storage, several laundry rooms throughout the complex, reserved parking space #85. Walk to Glenbrook Train Station (0.6 miles), neighborhood restaurants and shopping. Heat, hot water and cooking gas included in rent. A RARE FIND THIS UNIT HAS 2 RESERVED PARKING SPACES, (lINDEN hOUSE HAS NO VISITOR PARKING). AGENTS PLEASE READ AGENT REMARKS REGARDING APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS!
